title.en: China-to-US Textiles & Apparel Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国纺织品及服装进入美国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國紡織品及服裝進入美國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China textile and apparel documentation against US FTC fibre-content and care labelling, CPSC flammability and children's product requirements, and CBP country-of-origin and UFLPA forced-labor enforcement.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国纺织品及服装文件与美国FTC纤维成分及护理标签、CPSC易燃性及儿童产品要求、CBP原产地及UFLPA强迫劳动执法的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國紡織品及服裝文件與美國FTC纖維成分及護理標籤、CPSC易燃性及兒童產品要求、CBP原產地及UFLPA強迫勞動執法的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a legal opinion, customs determination, certification decision, import-compliance audit, forced-labor assessment, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and compliance professionals should verify current US law, FTC regulations, CPSC requirements, CBP rules, UFLPA Entity List status, and applicable tariff rates with qualified professionals before shipment. UFLPA enforcement, Section 301 tariff rates, and CPSC regulatory positions are subject to change.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成法律意见、海关裁定、认证结论、进口合规审计、强迫劳动评估或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和合规专业人员在发货前应与合格专业人士核验现行美国法律、FTC法规、CPSC要求、CBP规则、UFLPA实体名单状态及适用关税税率。UFLPA执法、301条款关税税率及CPSC监管立场可能随时变化。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成法律意見、海關裁定、認證結論、進口合規審計、強迫勞動評估或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和合規專業人員在發貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行美國法律、FTC法規、CPSC要求、CBP規則、UFLPA實體名單狀態及適用關稅稅率。UFLPA執法、301條款關稅稅率及CPSC監管立場可能隨時變化。

answer_first.en: FTC fibre-content and care labelling (English, permanent), CPSC flammability testing (16 CFR 1610), mandatory third-party CPC and tracking labels for children's products, and UFLPA forced-labor supply-chain documentation for cotton goods are the major US compliance gaps compared with Chinese GB 18401 / GB 31701 domestic requirements. The US has no CE-equivalent single mark.
answer_first.zh: 相较中国GB 18401 / GB 31701国内要求，FTC纤维成分及护理标签（英文、永久性）、CPSC易燃性测试（16 CFR 1610）、儿童产品强制第三方CPC及追溯标签、棉质商品的UFLPA强迫劳动供应链文件，是进入美国的主要合规差距。美国没有CE等同的单一标志。
answer_first.zht: 相較中國GB 18401 / GB 31701國內要求，FTC纖維成分及護理標籤（英文、永久性）、CPSC易燃性測試（16 CFR 1610）、兒童產品強制第三方CPC及追溯標籤、棉質商品的UFLPA強迫勞動供應鏈文件，是進入美國的主要合規差距。美國沒有CE等同的單一標誌。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, US government (ftc.gov, cpsc.gov, ecfr.gov, cbp.gov, ustr.gov), or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. UFLPA Entity List and Section 301 tariff rates must be re-verified before any human_reviewed=true release.
